description: Stable diagnostic identifiers emitted by the gaussian-spz plugin. Codes are never renumbered or reused; messages may be reworded. Every message starts with its bracketed code, e.g. "[GSPZ-E003] ...".

diagnostics.summary: The file is not an SPZ container: it has neither a gzip member whose decompressed stream starts with the SPZ magic nor a plaintext SPZ magic.
diagnostics.action: Provide a file exported as Niantic SPZ. If the file came from another tool, verify it was not renamed from a different format.

diagnostics.summary: The SPZ header declares zero Gaussians.
diagnostics.action: Provide a file containing at least one Gaussian.

diagnostics.summary: The SPZ container version is not supported by this release. Supported container versions are 1-3; version 4 (the ZSTD container) is planned for a later release.
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset as SPZ version 1-3, or wait for version 4 support.

diagnostics.summary: The container structure is malformed: a damaged gzip member header, a decompressed stream shorter than the SPZ header, or a plaintext layout no SPZ version defines.
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset; the file does not follow the documented SPZ container layout.

diagnostics.summary: The declared Gaussian count is outside the representable range.
diagnostics.action: The count exceeds the format maximum (2147483647) or is not addressable on this platform; re-export the asset with a valid count.

diagnostics.summary: The declared spherical-harmonics degree is outside the specification range 0-4.
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset with a supported SH degree.

diagnostics.summary: The container is truncated: the compressed stream ends before the declared attribute streams are complete.
diagnostics.action: The file was cut short in transfer or storage; obtain a complete copy.

diagnostics.summary: The container is corrupt: the DEFLATE stream is not decodable, or the gzip CRC32/length trailer does not match the decompressed data.
diagnostics.action: The file's bytes were altered; obtain an intact copy.

diagnostics.summary: Unexpected trailing data: decompressed bytes follow the attribute streams without the extensions flag, or bytes follow the gzip member.
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset; appended data is not part of the documented container layout.

diagnostics.summary: The file could not be opened or read.
diagnostics.action: Check that the path exists, is a regular file, and is readable.

diagnostics.summary: The spherical-harmonics degree is valid SPZ but not supported by this release; supported degrees are 0-3.
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset with SH degree 0-3, or wait for a release whose shared model carries degree 4.

diagnostics.summary: A float16 position in an SPZ version 1 container is not finite (NaN or infinity).
diagnostics.action: Re-export the asset; positions must be finite.

diagnostics.summary: The decoded cloud failed shared model validation before authoring. The decoder should have rejected the input with a more specific code first.
diagnostics.action: Report a bug against usd-3dgs-plugins with the file; this indicates a decoder gap rather than a normal malformed-input failure.

diagnostics.summary: The declared Gaussian count and SH degree exceed what this platform can allocate.
diagnostics.action: The derived model size overflowed or its allocation failed; import the asset on a machine with more memory or reduce the asset size. A partial cloud is never loaded.

diagnostics.summary: Internal misuse of the import pipeline (null output parameters, inconsistent container spans). Not reachable from file content.
diagnostics.action: Report a bug against usd-3dgs-plugins with the reproduction.

diagnostics.summary: The in-memory USD stage could not be created.
diagnostics.action: Check the OpenUSD installation and plugin registration; this failure is environmental, not file content.

diagnostics.summary: The /Asset or /Asset/Splat prim could not be defined on the generated layer.
diagnostics.action: Report a bug against usd-3dgs-plugins; the authoring scaffold is fixed and should always succeed on a healthy stage.

diagnostics.summary: An attribute value could not be authored on the generated layer.
diagnostics.action: Report a bug against usd-3dgs-plugins with the file that triggered it.

diagnostics.summary: The extent computation overflowed to a non-finite bound.
diagnostics.action: The decoded positions or scales are at the edge of float range; re-export the asset with values inside a renderable range.

diagnostics.summary: Writing USD content back to SPZ is unsupported; the plugin is read-only.
diagnostics.action: Export through a Gaussian Splatting tool; USD-to-SPZ conversion is out of scope for this plugin.

diagnostics.summary: Extension records were present and ignored; they are not part of the shared Gaussian model.
diagnostics.action: No action needed unless the extension data matters to your pipeline; if it does, file a feature request.

diagnostics.summary: The antialiased flag was set and ignored; the authored schema does not carry an antialiasing convention.
diagnostics.action: Be aware the source asset was trained with the antialiased (mip-splatting style) convention; renderers that assume the classic convention may show slight differences.
